extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the very early part of the series (roughly indices 0–10), there is a sharp upward spike reaching close to the global maximum (around 0.8–1.0) followed quickly by a strong drop.
R2: In the early‑middle part (roughly indices 10–25), values recover from this drop and rise to a mid‑level plateau around 0.4–0.6 with small oscillations.
R3: In the later part (roughly indices 45–60), there are one or two pronounced narrow spikes (fast up‑down excursions) that stand out above their local neighborhood.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the very early part of the series (roughly indices 0–10), there is a steep monotonic or near‑monotonic decline from a high value (around 0.7–0.8) down to a clear low (around 0.1–0.2) without an early tall spike.
R2: In the middle section (roughly indices 15–40), values stay in a mid‑range band around 0.4–0.6 with relatively smoother, less jagged fluctuations compared with Class 0.
R3: In the later part (roughly indices 40–60), there is a single dominant deep valley: values drop from mid‑range down to near the minimum (around 0.0–0.1) and then recover, forming a broad V‑shaped trough rather than several narrow spikes.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10% of the series, there is a sharp peak above ~0.8 followed by a rapid drop below ~0.3.  
R2: Between 15% and 40% of the series, values stay mostly in a mid-range band (about 0.3–0.6) with no long flat low segment.  
R3: In the last 20% of the series, there are oscillations between mid and higher values (roughly 0.4–0.7) without a deep, sustained dip near zero.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts high (around 0.6–0.8) and then steadily declines to a clear trough below ~0.2 within the first 15–20% of its length.  
R2: In the middle section (about 20%–60%), the values hover in a mid band (roughly 0.3–0.6) without very sharp spikes.  
R3: In the last 30% of the series, there is a pronounced deep dip close to zero (below ~0.1–0.15) followed by a recovery to mid values (~0.4–0.6).

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: Has at least one very high peak above 0.75 before time step 15.  
R2: After that early peak, the signal falls quickly to below 0.25 at least once before time step 20.  
R3: In the middle–late part (time steps 30–60), values fluctuate around 0.4–0.6 without any long, smooth monotonic decrease.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: Starts relatively high (above 0.6) and then shows a long, mostly monotonic decrease down to near 0.2 or lower by about time step 10–15.  
R2: After this early drop, the series stabilizes in a mid-range plateau (roughly 0.3–0.6) for most of the middle segment (time steps 15–40).  
R3: Contains one pronounced deep valley below 0.15 occurring later in the series (after time step 40), followed by a recovery back above 0.4.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10–15% of the series, there is a sharp upward peak that reaches near the global maximum, followed by a rapid drop.
R2: In the middle portion (roughly 20–50% of the series), values fluctuate moderately around a mid‑level (≈0.4–0.6) without long flat segments.
R3: In the last 30% of the series, there is at least one pronounced V‑shaped dip (strong fall then rise) but no long, smooth monotonic decrease.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 10–20% of the series, values start high and then show a strong overall downward drift, with the local minimum of this segment occurring clearly after the initial maximum.
R2: In the central part (≈20–50% of the series), the signal stays within a mid‑range band (≈0.3–0.6) with relatively smoother, lower‑amplitude oscillations than Class 0.
R3: In the last 30% of the series, there is a long, mostly monotonic decrease to a distinct low point, followed by a recovery that does not return to the initial high level.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the very early part (indices ~0–15), there is at least one sharp *upward* spike that reaches around 0.8–1.0, followed quickly by a deep drop toward ~0.1–0.2.  
R2: After this spike-drop pattern, the mid-section (indices ~15–45) stays in a moderate band, roughly between 0.3 and 0.6, with undulating but not extreme oscillations.  
R3: In the late part (indices ~45–70), there are one or more pronounced peaks above ~0.6 separated by valleys that are still relatively high (typically staying above ~0.1–0.15), so the signal does not remain very low for long.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series usually starts high (around 0.6–0.75) and then *monotonically or smoothly* declines into a clear low trough (near 0.1–0.2) within the first ~15 indices.  
R2: The mid-section (indices ~15–40) forms a broad “plateau” or gentle hill: it rises from the early trough and stays mostly between about 0.4 and 0.6, without sharp peaks above ~0.7.  
R3: In the late part (indices ~40–60), there is a very steep fall from a local maximum (~0.6–0.8) down to near the minimum of the entire series (~0.0–0.1), creating a prominent deep valley before the final small recovery.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10–15% of the series, there is a strong upward spike that reaches a local maximum above 0.7, followed by a rapid drop.  
R2: In the middle third (roughly 20–45% of the series), the values stay mostly in a mid-range band (about 0.35–0.65) with several moderate oscillations but no long, monotonic descending segment.  
R3: In the last third (after ~45% of the series), there are large oscillations that include at least one very low valley (below ~0.15–0.2) followed by a sharp rebound above ~0.5.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 10–15% of the series, there is a steep overall decline from a high value (around or above 0.7) down to a low valley near or below 0.2, without an early tall upward spike.  
R2: In the middle third of the series, values remain mostly in a moderate band (about 0.3–0.6) and show only gentle up‑and‑down fluctuations, without very low troughs.  
R3: In the last third, there is a pronounced long downward segment that takes the series from mid values (~0.5–0.7) to a deep minimum near or below 0.1, after which it recovers back toward mid values.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 15% of the series, there is a sharp upward peak above 0.8 followed by a drop below 0.3.  
R2: In the middle third of the series, values fluctuate moderately around 0.45–0.6 without any very deep valley below 0.15.  
R3: In the last third of the series, there is at most one brief dip below 0.2 and the signal returns to around 0.5–0.6.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 20% of the series, the signal starts high (above 0.6) and then steadily decreases to a pronounced low near 0.15–0.2.  
R2: In the middle third of the series, values form a broad “plateau” between 0.4 and 0.6 with no sharp high peak above 0.7.  
R3: In the last third of the series, there is a prominent deep valley below 0.1–0.15, followed by a recovery to around 0.4–0.6.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: At the very beginning (first 5–8 time points), the series quickly rises to a high local peak (around 0.7–1.0) and then drops sharply.
R2: After this early peak and drop, the middle part of the series (roughly time 10–45) fluctuates around a moderate level (≈0.3–0.6) without staying near 0 for long.
R3: There is no long, nearly monotonic decrease from a high value across the first third of the series.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts at a high value (around 0.6–0.8) and then shows a long, mostly monotonic fall toward a low value (≈0.1–0.2) over the first 10–15 time points, without an early sharp peak and drop.
R2: After this initial long decrease, the middle segment (≈time 15–45) stays relatively flat to mildly undulating at moderate values (≈0.4–0.6).
R3: In the later part (after ≈time 40), the series exhibits one deep dip toward very low values (near 0–0.1) followed by a recovery toward mid-level values (≈0.4–0.6).

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10–15% of the series, a sharp positive spike appears, reaching close to the global maximum, followed by a rapid drop.
R2: In the middle third of the series, values stay mostly in a mid-range band (roughly 0.3–0.6) without very deep dips.
R3: In the last third of the series, there is at least one pronounced “valley” where the value falls close to the minimum range before rising again.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 10–20% of the series, values start high and then show a clear downward slope into a relatively low region (a descending front segment).
R2: In the middle third of the series, values fluctuate in a mid-range band (roughly 0.3–0.6) but without an early sharp spike like in Class 0.
R3: In the last third of the series, there is a strong, steep drop from mid/high values toward a low minimum, followed by only a partial recovery.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the very early part (time 0–10), the series shows a sharp spike upward above ~0.8 followed by a steep drop below ~0.3.  
R2: In the middle part (time 20–40), the series stays mostly in a mid-range band between ~0.3 and ~0.6 without touching very low (≤0.1) values.  
R3: In the late part (after time ~45), the series oscillates between mid and high values (roughly 0.3–0.7) without forming a very deep, narrow valley close to zero.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the very early part (time 0–10), the series quickly decreases from a high value (≥0.6) to a low valley around or below ~0.2, without first forming an extreme spike above ~0.9.  
R2: Around the middle (time 30–50), the series contains a pronounced, relatively narrow peak above ~0.7 followed by a sustained sharp drop to very low values (near 0 or ≤0.1).  
R3: After that deep middle dip, the series recovers in the late part (after time ~50) to mid-range values (roughly 0.3–0.6).
